name: No-Bake Brownie Bites
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg Pillsbury Rich & Moist Fudge Brownie Mix
1 Cup M&Ms® Plain Chocolate Candy or Reese's Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper.
2. In a large saucepan, combine brownie mix, milk, and butter. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring constantly. Boil for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
3. Add peanut butter and vanilla; blend well. Stir in oats. Carefully stir in candy pieces. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls onto waxed paper-lined cookie sheets.
4. Cool cookies for 5 minutes or until completely cooled.
